name: Rapid IP Validation Test
description: AI pipeline template for quickly validating new IP/product ideas across demographics with multiple messaging hooks

ip_name.description: Name of the IP or product concept being validated

ip_description.description: Short description of the IP for ad body copy

landing_url.description: Landing page URL for the IP test

daily_budget.description: Daily budget in cents per ad set ($15/day)
